svg.text: RX path — wire to kernel socket buffer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the PHY decode signals and hand them to the MAC?')
sendPrompt('When does the MAC check and strip the FCS on receive?')
g.text: bad FCS → silently dropped, no IRQ

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the NIC DMA a received frame into kernel memory?')
g.text: DMA writes frame into RX ring buffer
writes to pre-allocated kernel pages via PCIe

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the difference between a legacy IRQ and MSI-X for NIC receive?')
g.text: CPU interrupted, IRQ handler runs briefly

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is NAPI and why was it introduced to replace pure interrupt-driven RX?')
g.text: drains RX ring, builds sk_buff per frame

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does netif_receive_skb dispatch to the right protocol handler?')
sendPrompt('How does TCP copy received data into a socket receive buffer?')
